title: APM: Suspicious JavaScript Execution Patterns
description: Detects suspicious JavaScript execution patterns in browser telemetry indicating crypto mining, keylogging, formjacking, or other malicious client-side scripts. Uses OpenTelemetry browser instrumentation to monitor JS execution context.
query: ('Log Source' = 'enterprise-crm-portal' or 'Log Source' = 'octo-drone-shop' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs') and ((('HTTP URL' like '*coinhive*' or 'HTTP URL' like '*cryptonight*' or 'HTTP URL' like '*coin-hive*' or 'HTTP URL' like '*minero.cc*' or 'HTTP URL' like '*jsecoin*' or 'HTTP URL' like '*cryptoloot*')) or ( (('Span Attributes' like '*keydown*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*keypress*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*keyup*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*addEventListener*')) and (('Span Attributes' like '*creditcard*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*credit-card*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*payment*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*checkout*')) ) or (('HTTP URL' like '*btoa(*' or 'HTTP URL' like '*atob(*' or 'HTTP URL' like '*XMLHttpRequest*' or 'HTTP URL' like '*sendBeacon*')))
